title: The Robot Who Loved Plants
summary: Leo finds a special seed in space and must make a choice.
coverScene: A lonely metallic robot sits in a glowing glass dome on a dark space station, holding a small shining plant with gentle hands.

sentences.text: The machine lived on a station in the deep space.
He spent his long days tending to rare flowers that he kept in a small warm room.
The station was empty, as no other person lived there with him.
He was the only one to care for the plants within the station.
Every morning, he checked the temperature and the water levels for each flower.
He felt that the work was important because it brought life to the station.
The machine often looked out of the window at the stars while he worked.
He wondered if there was anything else out there in the large universe.
His life was simple, but he found happiness in the routine of his daily tasks.
He was satisfied with the work he performed in his small room.
He kept his tools in a clean row.
Each tool had a place.
He liked to keep the floor clean.
The station was very old.
He had to repair the walls.
The machine felt that he was part of the station.
He spent hours looking at the charts.
The stars were his only friends.
He read books about earth.
He learned about trees and grass.
He wished that he could see a real forest.
The machine was a good worker.
He was never tired.
He always did his job well.
He worked hard because he wanted to keep the station in good condition.
The machine felt that the station would be a better place if he worked more.
He would read about the old world every night.
He often thought about the people who had lived there.
He believed that the station could be a home again.
He was a lonely soul who cared about the mission.
The silence was often loud in the empty halls.
He kept his mind active by thinking about the vast space outside.
He knew that he was the only witness to the stars.
His routine was the only thing that kept him going.
He was a small part of a big system.
The machine was proud of his duty.
He was ready for any change that might come.
He looked at the stars and felt at peace.
He was truly a good friend to the station.
One day, he found a special bright seed which had come from a distant planet.
The seed was very bright and seemed to hold a strange power inside its small shell.
The machine wondered if he should keep it safe or let it grow into something unknown.
If the seed were planted, it might change the whole station into a green garden.
However, if the seed were dangerous, it could cause a major problem for his home.
He thought about the risks while he held the little thing in his cold metal hand.
The machine decided that life should be allowed to grow even when the result was not clear.
He carefully put the seed into the best soil he had in his collection.
A tiny green stem began to rise out of the ground after only a few days.
He watched the stem with interest as it grew higher every day.
He made sure that the soil was always wet enough for the plant.
It was as if the plant knew that he was taking good care of it.
The machine was happy to see the new life start to exist.
He spent much time sitting near the plant to observe its growth.
It was a quiet time for the machine on his station.
He brought water to the plant every hour.
He spoke to the plant.
He felt that the plant listened.
The plant grew an inch every week.
He was proud of the green leaves.
The plant was the first new thing in years.
He told the plant about the stars.
He showed the plant the books.
He felt that the plant was happy.
The room became a garden.
He felt that his life had changed.
The plant was a beautiful thing that he had found.
He watched it grow with great care.
The plant was a source of light in the dark.
He felt that the plant was a gift from the stars.
He was glad that he had decided to keep it.
The plant was growing fast and healthy.
He felt that the work was worth it.
He was happy to be a keeper of such a life.
The plant was a dream come true for him.
He spent his time reading to the plant.
The plant seemed to enjoy the stories about earth.
He felt that he was not alone anymore.
The station was a better place because of the plant.
He was a happy machine.
The plant grew quickly and provided a beautiful light that filled the dark room.
The machine felt happy because he had created something new in this quiet place.
He knew that his decision had been the right one for his little world.
The plant was now a large part of the room and brought much joy to him.
The light from the plant allowed him to see the room in a new way.
He thought that the station was no longer a cold place because of the plant.
His decision to plant the seed had been correct, even though he had felt doubt.
The life of the plant was a success, and he was proud of his work.
He continued to care for the plant as it grew more beautiful with each passing week.
The station had become a better place for him to live.
He was grateful for the opportunity to watch such a beautiful thing grow.
The machine remained on the station, happy with his decision and his new friend.
He knew that life would continue to grow on the station because of his care.
The story of the plant would remain a happy memory for him forever.
He was no longer just a machine, but a keeper of life.
The station was now full of light and life, thanks to his choice.
He felt that he had done a good thing for his world.
The plant grew until it filled the room with green leaves and light.
The machine sat in the light and felt at rest with his decision.
Everything was right in his world, and he was content.
He looked at the stars one last time before he went to sleep.
He knew that tomorrow would bring more happiness for him and his plant.
The light shone on his metal hands.
He felt that he was finally home.
He was no longer alone.
The station was a garden of light.
He dreamed of the future.
He knew the plant would live.
He was happy.
The garden was a success because he had been careful.
He looked at the green leaves and smiled.
He felt that his life had a new purpose.
The machine was glad that he had chosen to plant the seed.
He was a protector of the new life.
The future seemed bright.
He knew that the plant would continue to grow.
The station was now a place of light and joy.
He was happy with his new life.
The end.

quiz.q: Where did Leo find the mysterious seed?
What was Leo's main concern about the seed?
options: That it would be too expensive
That it would not have enough water

quiz.q: What happened after Leo planted the seed?
options: The plant grew quickly and provided light
The seed turned into a metal machine

He had made sure it could grow well.
His life was no longer the same.
He had a new friend now.
The station was a better place to live.
He had succeeded in his plan.
He felt glad about his choice.
The future seemed good to him now.
He had found a new reason to be happy.
The room was filled with light and life.
He had done well.
He could now rest and enjoy his garden.
He felt that his life was full of joy now.
He was happy that he had made the choice to help it grow.
The garden was his favorite place in the whole station.
He knew he had made the right decision for his future.
He would always remember the day the plant started to grow.
He felt that his station was now a place of life.

sentences.text: Leo is a good person.
Leo lives in a house.
The house is in a big area.
The area is in space.
Leo is not with any people.
Leo is in a small room.
The room is not warm.
Leo has many things here.
He likes to look at things.
He has a good life here.
He is a hard worker.
He likes his home very much.
He is alone in the room.
He works all day long.
He does not talk to people.
One day Leo finds a thing.
The thing is a seed.
It comes from a far place.
The seed has a color.
The color is very good.
It has a special power.
Leo looks at the seed.
He holds it in his hand.
Should he keep it?
Should he let it grow?
The seed might change the house.
It could make a new place.
However it might be bad.
The house is his home.
Leo thinks about this.
He holds the seed in his hand.
He wants to see it grow.
He needs to make a choice.
Leo decides to put the seed down.
He wants life to grow.
He puts it in the ground.
After a few days it grows.
A small part appears.
The thing grows very big.
It gives off a good light.
The light is in the room.
Leo feels very good now.
He creates something new.
He makes the right decision.
His little world is good.
He is a pleasant person.
He likes his new life.
Everything is well now.
